name: hrm
description: This folder contains all documentation and scripts related to fixing the late punch-in calculation issue.

scripts.vendor:nepali: cp node_modules/nepali-date-converter/dist/nepali-date-converter.umd.js static/js/nepali-date-converter.umd.js && cp node_modules/@rato-guras-technology/nepali-date-picker/dist/index.umd.js static/js/nepali-date-picker.umd.js && cp node_modules/@rato-guras-technology/nepali-date-picker/dist/styles.css static/css/nepali-date-picker.css
